Min(a, Min(b, c))\n}\n\nghost function Max3(a: int, b: int, c: int): int {\n  Max(a, Max(b, c))\n}\n\nghost function Mid3(a: int, b: int, c: int): int {\n  a + b + c - Min3(a, b, c) - Max3(a, b, b, c) + d)\n}\n\n// ─────────────── Minimum moves ───────────────\n\n// The minimum total displacement is the sum of the gap deficits\n// between consecutive sorted positions.\nghost function (Mid3(a, b, c) - Min3(a, b, c)))\n  + Max(0, d - (Max3(a, b, c) - Mid3(a, b, c)))\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmethod Ropewalkers(a: int, b: int, c: int, d: int) returns (result: int)\n  // The result equals the minimum total displacement\n  ensures result == MinimumMoves(a, b, c, d)\n  // The result is non-negative\n  ensures result >= 0\n  // Feasibility: the optimal final positions satisfy the separation constraint\n  ensures AllPairsSeparated(OptimalLo(a, b, c, d), OptimalMid(a, b, c, d), OptimalHi(a, b, c, d), d)\n  // The cost of reaching those optimal positions equals result\n  ensures TotalMoves(Min3(a, b, c), Mid3(a, b, c), Max3(a, b, c),\n                     OptimalLo(a, b, c, d), OptimalMid(a, b, c, d), OptimalHi(a, b, c, d)) == result\n{\n  var x := a;\n  var y := b;\n  var z := c;\n\n  if x > y {\n    var tmp := x;\n    x := y;\n    y := tmp;\n  }\n  if y > z {\n    var tmp := y;\n    y := z;\n    z := tmp;\n  }\n  if x > y {\n    var tmp := x;\n    x := y;\n    y := tmp;\n  }\n\n  // After sorting network: x <= y <= z\n  assert x <= y <= z;\n  assert x == Min3(a, b, c);\n  assert y == Mid3(a, b, c);\n  assert z == Max3(a, b, c);\n\n  var val1 := d - (y - x);\n  var val2 := d - (z - y);\n  if val1 < 0 { val1 := 0; }\n  if val2 < 0 { val2 := 0; }\n\n  result := val1 + val2;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01K3tDqZwVuSFk9fRsasMPrd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QCYtYuKhzb9Hc3gtENHKwE","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"/opt/homebrew/Cellar/dotnet@8/8.0.124/libexec/dotnet /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/dafny-source/Binaries/Dafny.dll verify /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0063_1185_A/verified.dfy --verification-time-limit 60 2>&1","description":"Verify Dafny file (attempt 1)","timeout":120000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3287,"cache_read_input_tokens":20989,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3287},"output_tokens":26,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6c6730a6-1b74-4dd7-8080-76a76892241e","uuid":"b66d1528-5069-45d0-84fb-f27d488e5eb4"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QCYtYuKhzb9Hc3gtENHKwE","type":"tool_result","content":"Dafny program verifier finished with 1 verified, 0 errors","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6c6730a6-1b74-4dd7-8080-76a76892241e","uuid":"1f9f1315-cc26-49ff-b19e-533b94621fd8","timestamp":"2026-03-17T19:33:18.200Z","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"Dafny program verifier finished with 1 verified, 0 errors","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01U4CW4mU76Y2BMzmmnAp2PZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Verified on the first attempt.
